tool.name: spawn_attack_surface_agents
tool.description: Read the latest layered attack-surface review for a target and spawn a phase-based swarm of specialized child agents for host/service/module reconnaissance, endpoint/object validation, chain analysis, and blind-spot reduction. Use this after build_attack_surface_review when the root agent needs to fan out work instead of continuing sequentially.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical assessment target label whose latest attack-surface review should be used.

parameter.name: max_agents
parameter.description: Maximum number of child agents to create from the current review snapshot. Default: 6.

parameter.name: strategy
parameter.description: Agent-allocation strategy. Use balanced for mixed coverage, coverage_first to reserve slots for recon and blind-spot closure, or depth_first to bias toward endpoint validation and chaining. Default: balanced.

parameter.name: dry_run
parameter.description: When true, only return the recommended agent batch without creating agents. Default: false.

parameter.name: inherit_context
parameter.description: Whether spawned child agents inherit the current conversation history. Default: false.

parameter.name: include_recon
parameter.description: Whether to create Phase 1 host, service/port, and app/module surface expansion agents. Default: true.

parameter.name: include_validation
parameter.description: Whether to create Phase 2 endpoint, parameter, and object-boundary validation agents. Default: true.

parameter.name: include_chains
parameter.description: Whether to create Phase 3 chain-building agents from exposures and mapped chain opportunities. Default: true.

parameter.name: include_blind_spots
parameter.description: Whether to create coverage-gap reduction agents from the review blind spots plus role and bug-class coverage gaps. Default: true.

returns.description: Summary of the review snapshot plus the created or recommended child agents and any skipped duplicates.

tool.name: spawn_strong_signal_agents
tool.description: Read the shared assessment ledger, identify high-signal unresolved hypotheses with supporting evidence, and spawn narrow child agents that validate or deepen those exact signals instead of leaving the root or parent agent to keep digging manually.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical assessment target label whose hypotheses and evidence should be mined.

parameter.name: max_agents
parameter.description: Maximum number of narrow validator agents to create from the strongest current signals. Default: 3.

parameter.name: hypothesis_ids
parameter.description: Optional explicit hypothesis IDs to narrow onto instead of auto-selecting the strongest unresolved signals.

parameter.name: min_priority
parameter.description: Minimum hypothesis priority to consider when auto-selecting signals. Default: high.

parameter.name: minimum_score
parameter.description: Minimum strong-signal score required when auto-selecting hypotheses. Default: 4.

parameter.name: dry_run
parameter.description: When true, only return the recommended signal-followup batch without creating agents. Default: false.

parameter.name: inherit_context
parameter.description: Whether spawned child agents inherit the current conversation history. Default: false.

returns.description: Summary of strong-signal candidates plus the created or recommended validation agents and any skipped duplicates.

tool.name: spawn_impact_chain_agents
tool.description: Read the shared assessment ledger and the latest attack-surface review, then spawn dedicated child agents that focus on escalating confirmed or high-signal bugs into higher-impact chains, boundary crossings, and reportable end-to-end narratives.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical assessment target label whose hypotheses, evidence, and review pivots should be mined.

parameter.name: max_agents
parameter.description: Maximum number of impact/chaining agents to create from the strongest current bug signals. Default: 2.

parameter.name: hypothesis_ids
parameter.description: Optional explicit hypothesis IDs to escalate instead of auto-selecting impact-ready bugs.

parameter.name: min_priority
parameter.description: Minimum hypothesis priority to consider when auto-selecting impact candidates. Default: high.

parameter.name: minimum_score
parameter.description: Minimum impact score required when auto-selecting hypotheses. Default: 6.

parameter.name: dry_run
parameter.description: When true, only return the recommended impact/chaining batch without creating agents. Default: false.

parameter.name: inherit_context
parameter.description: Whether spawned child agents inherit the current conversation history. Default: false.

returns.description: Summary of impact-ready candidates plus the created or recommended chaining agents and any skipped duplicates.

tool.name: run_attack_surface_orchestration_round
tool.description: Refresh the latest attack-surface review from current runtime, surface, workflow, and ledger data, then orchestrate the next wave of review, strong-signal, and impact-chain agents from the root subtree. Use this after child agents finish or after new evidence materially changes coverage so orchestration can continue in rounds instead of only at the first fan-out.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical assessment target label whose review and ledger should be refreshed.

parameter.name: scope_targets
parameter.description: Optional explicit scope targets to seed the refreshed review. When omitted, the tool infers scope from the current review, runtime inventory, surface artifacts, and workflows.

parameter.name: max_priorities
parameter.description: Maximum number of priority rows to keep in the refreshed review. Default: 16.

parameter.name: strategy
parameter.description: Swarm allocation strategy for the review fan-out. Default: coverage_first.

parameter.name: dry_run
parameter.description: When true, refresh the review but return recommended agent batches without creating agents. Default: false.

parameter.name: inherit_context
parameter.description: Whether spawned child agents inherit the current conversation history. Default: true.

parameter.name: force
parameter.description: When true, run a new orchestration round even if no new finished descendants or ledger changes were detected. Default: false.

parameter.name: require_new_data
parameter.description: When true, skip the round if nothing changed since the last recorded round. Default: true.

parameter.name: include_review_swarm
parameter.description: Whether to spawn the refreshed review swarm. Default: true.

parameter.name: include_signal_swarm
parameter.description: Whether to spawn strong-signal validator agents after the refresh. Default: true.

parameter.name: include_impact_swarm
parameter.description: Whether to spawn impact/chaining agents after the refresh. Default: true.

parameter.name: max_review_agents
parameter.description: Maximum number of review-phase agents to create in this round. Default: 8.

parameter.name: max_signal_agents
parameter.description: Maximum number of strong-signal agents to create in this round. Default: 4.

parameter.name: max_impact_agents
parameter.description: Maximum number of impact/chaining agents to create in this round. Default: 3.

returns.description: Summary of the refreshed review, change-detection reason, subtree progress snapshot, and the spawned or recommended review/signal/impact waves.
